ActiveDesignNavigation.description: The only server-authoritative undo/redo availability shown by the workbench.
ActiveDesignNavigation.title: ActiveDesignNavigation

ActiveDesignPartDisplay.description: Server-owned, non-geometric part presentation and edit-protection state.
ActiveDesignPartDisplay.title: ActiveDesignPartDisplay

ActiveDesignRenderPreset.description: Deterministic, visual-only camera and light selection for one Agent asset.
ActiveDesignRenderPreset.title: ActiveDesignRenderPreset

ActiveDesignSnapshot.description: The future single server-owned workbench state; storage/API follow in S002/S003.
ActiveDesignSnapshot.title: ActiveDesignSnapshot

AgentBlockoutConceptPreview.description: A disposable low-resolution software concept image, never a render asset.
AgentBlockoutConceptPreview.title: AgentBlockoutConceptPreview

AgentComponentCompatibility.description: A bounded replacement decision, never an engineering fitness score.
AgentComponentCompatibility.title: AgentComponentCompatibility

AgentMaterialPbr.description: Appearance-only PBR values; texture ids are content-addressed asset ids.
AgentMaterialPbr.title: AgentMaterialPbr

AgentMaterialTextureSummary.description: Safe catalog provenance; never exposes a filesystem path.
AgentMaterialTextureSummary.title: AgentMaterialTextureSummary

summary.default: 确认分件候选并保存为可编辑资产
summary.title: Summary

ConvertLegacyActiveDesignRequest.description: Explicitly ask to rebuild a read-only legacy Concept as an Agent asset.
ConvertLegacyActiveDesignRequest.title: ConvertLegacyActiveDesignRequest

EditableParameterBinding.description:
A bounded declaration for a future zero-basis parameter control.

The declaration is data only. It neither executes ShapeProgram nor broadens
the currently accepted ChangeSet operation paths.
EditableParameterBinding.title: EditableParameterBinding

GeometryCompileReadback.description: Immutable facts read from the exact GLB produced by one compilation.
GeometryCompileReadback.title: GeometryCompileReadback

ImportAgentGlbRequest.description: A self-contained GLB supplied by the user as a local reference asset.

summary.default: 导入 GLB 参考模型
summary.title: Summary

ImportAgentGlbRequest.title: ImportAgentGlbRequest

InitializeConceptWorkbenchRequest.description: Idempotent request to install the bundled Pack and bind a starter graph.
InitializeConceptWorkbenchRequest.title: InitializeConceptWorkbenchRequest

LegacyActiveDesignConversionResponse.description: A safe conversion hand-off, not a claim that legacy geometry is editable.
LegacyActiveDesignConversionResponse.title: LegacyActiveDesignConversionResponse

ModuleAssetCatalogMetadataInput.description: Human and review metadata kept separate from ModuleAssetManifest@1.
ModuleAssetCatalogMetadataInput.title: ModuleAssetCatalogMetadataInput

NavigateActiveDesignRequest.description: Request a server-owned undo or redo of the active Agent asset.
NavigateActiveDesignRequest.title: NavigateActiveDesignRequest

ProposeConnectorSnapRequest.description: Request an auditable snap of one non-root node to its graph parent.
ProposeConnectorSnapRequest.title: ProposeConnectorSnapRequest

RenderAgentBlockoutConceptPreviewRequest.description:
Request an ephemeral software image for a bounded, uncommitted direction.

This deliberately has no project write, asset id, Snapshot id, or export
option.  The server rebuilds the bounded ShapeProgram locally instead of
trusting a client-provided mesh or image.
RenderAgentBlockoutConceptPreviewRequest.title: RenderAgentBlockoutConceptPreviewRequest

SelectActiveDesignRequest.description: Select (or clear) one part of the active Agent assembly.
SelectActiveDesignRequest.title: SelectActiveDesignRequest

SetActiveDesignPartDisplayRequest.description: Apply one intentionally small zero-basis part control action.
SetActiveDesignPartDisplayRequest.title: SetActiveDesignPartDisplayRequest

SetActiveDesignRenderPresetRequest.description: Update one visual preset without changing the Agent asset version.
SetActiveDesignRenderPresetRequest.title: SetActiveDesignRenderPresetRequest

position.description: Millimeters in graph-world or module-local space.
position.title: Position
